name: Fried Yam Puffs- Epok-Epok Keladi
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 lb Yam cut into small pieces
recipeInstructions:
Puff Ingredients
1. Steam yam until cooked. Remove and mash. Leave to cool.
2. Heat cooking oil in a pan. Add prawns and meat and stir for 1 minute.
Add onions, spring onion, and mushrooms and stir for another minute.
3. Add salt, MSG, sugar, soy sauce, oyster sauce, and cornflour mixture.
Stir well. Add green peas and stir. Remove and cool.
4. Put puff ingredients in a bowl and mix well. Knead thoroughly. Divide
into 20-25 portions.
5. Roll each portion into a ball and flatten.
6. Put 1 tablespoon stuffing in the center of dough. Moisten edges, fold over,
and seal.
7. Heat cooking oil for deep frying. Deep fry until golden brown. Serve hot.
